claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Critically audited DinoBrain against verified RAG knowledge and the user's desired OS using local code/data verification plus 10 subagent reviews. Produced and pushed a consensus audit report identifying P0/P1 improvements: outer wrapper fail-closed, real source/provenance lineage, true read-only/review mode, protected installer updates, real hybrid retrieval, lower-noise context eval, behavior eval, lifecycle backpressure, durable SQLite/cold memory, safer public sync, task-correlated Observatory, and release/version parity.
